creator: freebsd.improper817@passinbox.com
text:
I'm not sure what the actual design is supposed to be, but on a new install of 13.1 with ZFS (suspect) this change was needed

diff --git a/sys/sys/module.h b/sys/sys/module.h
index efefaf4cb513..a3cd8aa8756a 100644
--- a/sys/sys/module.h
+++ b/sys/sys/module.h
@@ -254,7 +254,7 @@ extern int mod_debug;
 #endif	/* _KERNEL */
 
 #define	MAXMODNAMEV1V2	32
-#define	MAXMODNAMEV3	MAXPATHLEN
+#define	MAXMODNAMEV3	32
 #define	MAXMODNAME	MAXMODNAMEV3
 
 struct module_stat {

I'm unable to see with my 13.2 install - I'm unsure if I broke it with updating it wrong or something else.

And if anybody is wondering, filling a 64 byte array with pcg32() is about the same speed as using arc4random_buf.
